name: projeto-gestao-epi
description: Gestao digital de entrega de EPI - monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build -w @gestao-epi/shared && npm run build -w @gestao-epi/api && npm run build -w @gestao-epi/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @gestao-epi/shared && npm run typecheck -w @gestao-epi/api && npm run typecheck -w @gestao-epi/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @gestao-epi/shared && npm run lint -w @gestao-epi/api && npm run lint -w @gestao-epi/web
